summary: Frontend testing of LED Sign Designer major UI overhaul. All 9 features verified working: Professional menu bar with File/Edit/View/Tools dropdowns, collapsible Properties and Ports panels, large canvas workspace, Break Wire/Join Wire buttons, right-click context menu (no direct pixel add). No issues found.
critical_code_review_comments: ToolPanel.jsx is a legacy file not being used - can be removed for code cleanup
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for toolbar tools and actions
seed_data_creation: None - font file /usr/share/fonts/truetype/dejavu/DejaVuSans-Bold.ttf used for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All professional UI features verified. Key test steps: 1) Load font via File menu > Load Font, 2) Set text to 'HI' for faster tests, 3) Set font size to 30cm, 4) Click Generate. Right-click behavior: only shows context menu when 2+ pixels are selected (no direct pixel add). Break Wire and Join Wire buttons in left toolbar.

test_features_verified.menu_bar_file: PASS - File menu contains Load Font, Fill/Border/Both Mode, Export DXF/CJB, Exit
test_features_verified.menu_bar_edit: PASS - Edit menu contains Undo, Copy, Paste, Delete with shortcuts
test_features_verified.menu_bar_view: PASS - View menu contains Show Guide, Show Wiring, Show Numbers, Show Ports toggles
test_features_verified.menu_bar_tools: PASS - Tools menu contains Select (V), Pan (H), Wire Connect (W)
test_features_verified.left_toolbar_tools: PASS - Select, Pan, Wire Connect tools with data-testid attributes
test_features_verified.break_wire_button: PASS - Break Wire button in toolbar (data-testid='action-breakwire')
test_features_verified.join_wire_button: PASS - Join Wire button in toolbar (data-testid='action-joinwire')
test_features_verified.properties_panel_collapsible: PASS - Properties panel collapses and expands correctly
test_features_verified.ports_panel_collapsible: PASS - Ports panel on right side collapses and expands correctly
test_features_verified.status_bar: PASS - Shows Total, Border, Fill, Selected, Tool, Port stats (P1-P8)
test_features_verified.canvas_workspace: PASS - Canvas has large workspace (1476px width verified)
test_features_verified.right_click_no_pixel_add: PASS - Right-click does NOT directly add pixels, shows context menu only with 2+ pixels selected
test_features_verified.break_apart_removed: PASS - Break Apart removed from active UI (Toolbar.jsx)
